mapper.sql: id, inqb_apply_no, item_no, split_type, task_no, bom_id, supplier_code, stock_code, handle_result, model_no, quantity, use_qty, expected_delivery_date, end_user, user_dept, status, expiration_date, reply_dept, reply_supplier_dept, reply_no, reply_delivery_days, reply_accept_hl, reply_user, reply_time, reply_reason_code, reply_reason, reply_remark, remark, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_inqb_detail
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_inqb_detail (id, inqb_apply_no, item_no, split_type, task_no, bom_id, supplier_code, stock_code, handle_result, model_no, quantity, use_qty, expected_delivery_date, end_user, user_dept, status, expiration_date, reply_dept, reply_supplier_dept, reply_no, reply_delivery_days, reply_accept_hl, reply_user, reply_time, reply_reason_code, reply_reason, reply_remark, remark, create_user, create_time, update_user, update_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{inqbApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bomId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{handleResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{expectedDeliveryDate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{expirationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyDeliveryDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{replyAcceptHl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{replyReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{replyReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{replyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_inqb_detail
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
inqb_apply_no = #{record.inqbApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_no = #{record.taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bom_id = #{record.bomId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_result = #{record.handleResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_qty = #{record.useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
expected_delivery_date = #{record.expectedDeliveryDate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_dept = #{record.userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expiration_date = #{record.expirationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_dept = #{record.replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_supplier_dept = #{record.replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{record.replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_days = #{record.replyDeliveryDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_accept_hl = #{record.replyAcceptHl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_user = #{record.replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{record.replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_reason_code = #{record.replyReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_reason = #{record.replyReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
reply_remark = #{record.replyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update dbo.ops_inqb_detail set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, inqb_apply_no = #{record.inqbApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, item_no = #{record.itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_no = #{record.taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bom_id = #{record.bomId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, supplier_code = #{record.supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stock_code = #{record.stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, handle_result = #{record.handleResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, use_qty = #{record.useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, expected_delivery_date = #{record.expectedDeliveryDate,jdbcType=INTEGER}, end_user = #{record.endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_dept = #{record.userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, expiration_date = #{record.expirationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reply_dept = #{record.replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_supplier_dept = #{record.replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_no = #{record.replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_delivery_days = #{record.replyDeliveryDays,jdbcType=INTEGER}, reply_accept_hl = #{record.replyAcceptHl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_user = #{record.replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_time = #{record.replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, reply_reason_code = #{record.replyReasonCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, reply_reason = #{record.replyReason,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, reply_remark = #{record.replyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, create_user = #{record.createUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_user = #{record.updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update dbo.ops_inqb_detail
inqb_apply_no = #{inqbApplyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
item_no = #{itemNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_type = #{splitType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
task_no = #{taskNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bom_id = #{bomId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
supplier_code = #{supplierCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
stock_code = #{stockCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
handle_result = #{handleResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
use_qty = #{useQty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
expected_delivery_date = #{expectedDeliveryDate,jdbcType=INTEGER},
end_user = #{endUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_dept = #{userDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
expiration_date = #{expirationDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
reply_dept = #{replyDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_supplier_dept = #{replySupplierDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_no = #{replyNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_delivery_days = #{replyDeliveryDays,jdbcType=INTEGER},
reply_accept_hl = #{replyAcceptHl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_user = #{replyUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
reply_time = #{replyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

reply_remark = #{replyRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_user = #{updateUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
